creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144741
xdvik.diff

xdvik doesn't build under poudriere for me, as it wants to install libpaper twice. I believe the recent libpaper depends change wasn't complete and the attached patch at least fixes it for me.

Broken build: https://acme.spoerlein.net/poudriere/logs/bulk/freebsd:10:x86:64-default/2014-07-16_20h33m42s/logs/errors/tex-xdvik-22.86_2.log

Working build: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140716212100-47272
